data.body: Implemented, commit 4c9dadaef: prune_docker_caches (timeout-bounded builder prune --keep-storage $BUILD_CACHE_KEEP default 5GB + image prune, non-fatal, logged) called from record_backoff_failure AND success path. CI-run stub tests tests/unit/test_autodeploy_prune.py: 4 passed. --keep-storage verified on box Docker 25.0.14 via SSM.
